series_metadata.series_description: Filings of acquisitions, mergers, or reorganization of domestic stock or mutual insurance companies, health insuring corporations and fraternal benefit societies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years from date of approval, then shred/erase. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from date of approval, then shred/erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
